source.description: Replacement six-panel raster contact sheet generated July 6, 2026 for the July 5, 2026 Graham Cracker Day marker-doodle lesson, reviewed before cropping.
source.notes: Prompt required one consistent marker doodle s'more where the chocolate appears before the marshmallow overlaps it, no sticker border, no embedded labels, no arrows, and no fake UI. The previous contact sheet is preserved as drafts/graham-cracker-smore-doodle/graham-cracker-smore-doodle-contact-sheet-replaced-2026-07-06.png.

process_strategy: The sequence builds the cracker stack, chocolate layer, marshmallow layer, cracker holes, melty edges, and marker fill before the final panel only thickens outlines and brightens existing fills.

final_elements.name: top graham cracker
final_elements.description: A square top cracker tilted slightly forward.

final_elements.name: bottom graham cracker
final_elements.description: A matching lower cracker visible beneath the filling.

final_elements.name: chocolate layer
final_elements.description: A dark chocolate slab sitting on the bottom cracker and visible along the front and side.

final_elements.name: marshmallow layer
final_elements.description: A puffy white marshmallow added above and partly in front of the chocolate without fully covering it.

final_elements.name: cracker holes and break line
final_elements.description: Small marker dots and a center break line on the top cracker.

final_elements.name: melty marshmallow edges
final_elements.description: Rounded drips and squish marks on the marshmallow edge.

final_elements.name: bright marker fill
final_elements.description: Warm tan cracker fill, dark chocolate fill, and pale marshmallow shadows.

frames.visible_job: Draws the top and bottom cracker shapes with loose marker construction.
Adds the chocolate slab on top of the bottom cracker before the marshmallow is drawn.
Adds the puffy marshmallow above and partly in front of the chocolate while keeping the chocolate visible.
Adds cracker holes and the center break line to the top cracker.
Adds melty marshmallow edges and marker fills on the already-drawn parts.

final_step.visible_job: Thickens the black outlines, evens the cracker/chocolate marker fills, and clarifies the holes and melty edges already present.

rejection_checks: No cracker, marshmallow, chocolate, holes, melt edge, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may ink, fill, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
